title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks family as a Full Stack Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
